name: Guacamole
recipeInstructions:
Basic Green Salsa: Ground two or three green tomatoes, a small piece of onion, and serrano chiles.
Peel the avocados and mash them with a fork, reserving the pit. Mix the mashed avocado with lemon juice, diced red tomato, chopped onion, and cilantro. Add the basic green salsa, salt, and pepper. Transfer to a dish and add the pits inside for freshness; cover with fresh white cheese and serve.
